recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: The Butterfly
recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Home Alone
recommendations.overview: After being left at home by himself for the holidays, 10-year-old Max Mercer must work to defend his home from a married couple who tries to steal back a valuable heirloom.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: The Old Man and the Sea
recommendations.overview: An old fisherman makes the biggest catch of his life.

recommendations.title: Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: 1984, Sandusky, Ohio. A naive 17-year-old navigates heartbreak and self-expression as he explores his sexuality.

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: Sex, Party and Lies
recommendations.overview: A youth group is preparing for what will be the summer of their life, including secrets, lies, sex, confusion, evenings and holidays.

recommendations.title: Dìdi (弟弟)
recommendations.overview: In 2008, during the last month of summer before high school begins, an impressionable 13-year-old Taiwanese American boy learns what his family can't teach him: how to skate, how to flirt, and how to love your mom.

recommendations.title: Too Young to Die
recommendations.overview: An abused 15 year old is charged with a murder that carries the death penalty in this fact-based story.
